blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 479 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.0" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
